name: cms138v6-preventive-care-and-screening-tobacco-use-screening-and-cessation-intervention
description: CMS138v6 - Preventive Care and Screening: Tobacco Use: Screening and Cessation Intervention. Three-population CQM that screens adults for tobacco use and recommends cessation counseling and/or pharmacotherapy for current tobacco users.

protocols.description: Screens adults aged 18 and up for tobacco use within 24 months and recommends cessation interventions (counseling and/or pharmacotherapy) when tobacco use is identified.

meta.title: Preventive Care and Screening: Tobacco Use: Screening and Cessation Intervention
meta.description: Patients aged 18 years and older who have not been screened for tobacco use OR who have not received tobacco cessation intervention if identified as a tobacco user.
references: Siu AL; U.S. Preventive Services Task Force. Behavioral and Pharmacotherapy Interventions for Tobacco Smoking Cessation in Adults, Including Pregnant Women: U.S. Preventive Services Task Force Recommendation Statement. Ann Intern Med. 2015 Oct 20;163(8):622-34.
Siu AL; U.S. Preventive Services Task Force. Ann Intern Med. 2015 Oct 20;163(8):622-34.
